chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to bazi' Al-mu'adhdhin

text: و ما كان فيه عن بزيع المؤذّن فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السّعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بزيع المؤذّن‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Bazi' Al-Mu'adhdhin has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Sa'dabadi, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bazi' Al-Mu'adhdhin.
